name: CoreLogic
tagline: Industry-leading property data and analytics platform with AI insights
description:
CoreLogic is a comprehensive data and analytics platform that serves as a foundational resource for the real estate industry. It aggregates and analyzes vast datasets, including property records, MLS listings, mortgage and lien information, and market trends. The platform transforms this raw data into actionable intelligence through advanced analytics and AI-driven models, providing a clear, data-backed view of properties and markets.

Key features include its extensive property database with detailed histories and valuations, predictive analytics for forecasting market shifts and property values, and risk assessment tools for evaluating flood, wildfire, and other environmental hazards. These capabilities are designed for real estate professionals, mortgage lenders, insurers, and investors who require accuracy and depth.

A primary benefit is the ability to make informed decisions with confidence, minimizing risk and identifying opportunities. For example, a lender can use CoreLogic to instantly pull a full property profile, assess its current value against comparable sales, and evaluate potential natural hazard risks—all within a single workflow to streamline the underwriting process. By centralizing critical information, it enhances efficiency and supports strategic planning across the property lifecycle.
